title: Vowel Harmony
body:
Finnish divides vowels into groups that do not usually mix in the same word: back vowels (a, o, u), front vowels (ä, ö, y), and neutral vowels (i, e).

💡Suffixes change to match vowel harmony, for example talossa vs tytössä.

title: Negation
body:
Finnish uses a dedicated negative verb that conjugates by person: en, et, ei, emme, ette, eivät.

Example: En puhu suomea (I do not speak Finnish).
